svg.aria-label: Aegis-KMS architecture: four client classes (apps, storage vendors, AI agents, custom agents) reach the same audited KeyService through protocol-specific planes (REST, KMIP, MCP, Agent-AI), passing through IAM and writing to a Postgres journal, a pluggable root-of-trust, and an append-only audit sink.
svg.text: Four protocol planes, one audited core, pluggable root-of-trust. Every client class uses the same algebra.

g.text: AWS KMS · GCP KMS · Azure KV
